diff --git a/app/src/main/java/org/wikipedia/search/SearchViewModel.kt b/app/src/main/java/org/wikipedia/search/SearchViewModel.kt

+++ b/app/src/main/java/org/wikipedia/search/SearchViewModel.kt
@@ -15,3 +15,7 @@ class SearchViewModel : ViewModel() {
     fun search(query: String) {
         _results.value = repository.search(query)
     }
+
+    fun voiceSearch(transcript: String) {
+        search(transcript)
+    }
